name: 46 Neighborhood Crips
description: 46 NeighborHood Crips are a predominately African-American street gang located in the area of 46th Street & Western Avenue. In 2010 the Los Angeles Unified School District built a new middle school, Barack Obama Global Preparation Academy right in the central location of 46 NHC’s territory, between Western Avenue and St. Andrews Place along 46th Street.
